data.text/markdown: CSS
1. set layer order
@layer reset, engine, typography, components;
2. registered properties
must be on root ie. can not be in a layer

@property --_depth          { syntax: "<number>";  inherits: true;  initial-value: 0; }
@property --color           { syntax: "<color>";   inherits: true;  initial-value: oklch(0.5 0.2 85); }
@property --_dark           { syntax: "<number>";  inherits: true;  initial-value: 0; }
@property --_motion         { syntax: "<integer>"; inherits: true;  initial-value: 1; }
@property --_bg             { syntax: "<color>";   inherits: true;  initial-value: oklch(100% 0 0); }
@property --bg              { syntax: "<number>";  inherits: false; initial-value: 0; }
@property --type            { syntax: "<number>";  inherits: false; initial-value: 0; }
@property --border          { syntax: "<number>";  inherits: false; initial-value: 0; }
@property --interactive     { syntax: "<number>";  inherits: false; initial-value: 0; }
@property --shadow          { syntax: "<number>";  inherits: false; initial-value: 0; }
@property --contrast        { syntax: "<number>";  inherits: false; initial-value: 0.85; }
@property --cfg-type-scale  { syntax: "<number>";  inherits: true;  initial-value: 1; }
@property --cfg-space-scale { syntax: "<number>";  inherits: true;  initial-value: 1; }

3. Reset

@layer reset.fixes {
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; background-repeat: no-repeat; }
    :root { interpolate-size: allow-keywords; }
    :where(html) { color-scheme: light dark; line-height: 1.5; -moz-text-size-adjust: none; -webkit-text-size-adjust: none; text-size-adjust: none; }
    :where(body, figure, blockquote, dl, dd, p) { margin-block-end: 0; }
    :where(img, picture, svg) { max-width: 100%; display: block; height: auto; }
    :where(table, thead, tbody, tfoot, tr) { isolation: isolate; }
    :where(input, button, textarea, select) { font: inherit; }
}

@layer reset.opinions {
    :where(html) { scrollbar-width: thin; }
    :where(p) { text-wrap: pretty; }
    :where(h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6) { text-wrap: balance; }
    :where(body) { overflow-wrap: break-word; }             /* Prevent long strings from blowing out layouts */
    :where(img, picture, video, canvas, svg) { height: auto; }                  /* Preserve aspect ratios — height: auto is the missing piece */
    :where(svg) { color: currentColor; }                     /* SVG inherits text color by default — use color not fill for stroke compadibility */
    :where(button, [role="button"], summary, label[for],  input[type="file"]::file-selector-button) { cursor: pointer; } /* Cursor affordance for interactive elements */
    :where(:disabled, [aria-disabled="true"]) { cursor: not-allowed; }          /* Disable cursor on disabled elements */
    :where(table) { border-collapse: collapse; }            /* Universal table opinion — almost no one wants separated borders */
    :where(fieldset) { border: 0; padding: 0; margin: 0; min-inline-size: 0; }  /* Strip fieldset chrome — you'll restyle in components */
    :where(legend) { padding: 0; }                          /* Strip fieldset chrome — you'll restyle in components */
    :where(textarea) { resize: vertical; }                  /* Sensible textarea resize constraint */
    :where(textarea:not([rows])) { min-block-size: 10em; }  /* Sensible textarea resize constraint */
    :where(abbr[title]) { cursor: help; text-decoration: underline dotted; }   /* Abbreviation affordance */
    :where(summary) { list-style: none; }                   /* only if you want full control */
    :where(a) {text-decoration: none; }                     /* No underline on links /*

    :where(input) { autofill:shadow-[inset_0_0_0px_1000px_var(--bg_color)]  }

    /* Remove list semantics reset — use the :where([role="list"]) pattern
       so VoiceOver doesn't strip semantics when you remove list-style in CSS */
    :where(ul, ol):where([role="list"]) { list-style: none; padding: 0; }

    /* Hidden attribute should always mean hidden */
    :where([hidden]) { display: none; }

    /* Clean focus — remove :focus ring in favor of :focus-visible only */
    :where(:focus:not(:focus-visible)) { outline: none; }

    /* Pointer events off on inert content */
    :where([inert]) { cursor: default; }
}
4A. engine.color

/* ── engine ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

@layer engine {

  /* ── config ── */

  :root {
    --_dark: 0;
    --_motion: 1;
    --cfg-fluid-min-vp: 22.5rem;
    --cfg-fluid-max-vp: 77.5rem;
    --cfg-type-min:       1.125rem;
    --cfg-type-max:       1.25rem;
    --cfg-type-min-ratio: 1.2;
    --cfg-type-max-ratio: 1.25;
    --cfg-space-min:       0.5rem;
    --cfg-space-max:       0.75rem;
    --cfg-space-min-ratio: 1.4;
    --cfg-space-max-ratio: 1.65;
    --cfg-border-radius:  0.375rem;
  }

  /* ── environment ── */

  @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { :root { --_dark: 1; } }
  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { :root { --_motion: 0; } }
  html[data-ui-scheme="dark"]  { --_dark: 1; }
  html[data-ui-scheme="light"] { --_dark: 0; }
  html[data-ui-motion="none"]  { --_motion: 0; }
  html[data-ui-density="compact"]     { --cfg-space-scale: 0.75; }
  html[data-ui-density="comfortable"] { --cfg-space-scale: 1.25; }
  html[data-ui-size="small"]          { --cfg-type-scale: 0.85; }
  html[data-ui-size="large"]          { --cfg-type-scale: 1.15; }


  /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     BACKGROUND

     Trigger: any element with --bg in its style attribute, or body.

     :where([style*="--bg"]) has 0 specificity and matches any
     element whose style="\" contains the string "--bg". This is
     the "auto-trigger" — setting the property IS the opt-in.

     The oklch math is identical to v4's @function --background():
       L = (95% - dark*75%) + level * (-3% + dark*7%)
       C = min(0.02 + level² × 0.004, source-chroma)
       H = source-hue + level × 0.4
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

  body,
  :where([style*="--bg:"], [style*="--color:"], .surface) {
    --_bg-base: calc(95% - var(--_dark) * 75%);
    --_bg-step: calc(-3% + var(--_dark) * 7%);
    --_bg: oklch(
      from var(--color)
        clamp(10%, calc(var(--_bg-base) + var(--bg) * var(--_bg-step)), 99%)
        min(calc(0.02 + var(--bg) * var(--bg) * 0.004), c)
        calc(h + var(--bg) * 0.4)
    );
    background: var(--_bg);

    /* auto-contrast: text adapts to whatever --_bg computed to */
    color: oklch(
      from var(--_bg)
        calc(l + (clamp(0, calc((0.6 - l) * 999), 1) - l) * var(--contrast))
        c h
    );
  }


  /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     BORDER

     Trigger: --border in style attribute.

     Derives from var(--_bg) — the element's own computed
     background — so borders adapt to any surface or dark level.

     Unlike the old version (lightness-only nudge), this mirrors
     --bg's philosophy across all three OKLCH channels:

       L: step away from surface, direction auto-detected
       C: subtle chroma bloom — borders get slightly more chromatic
       H: tiny hue drift, same direction as --bg's hue shift

     When combined with --interactive, border intensifies on
     hover/active — the border "reacts" independently, not just
     as a passive side-effect of the background shift.

     NOTE: colon in selector prevents --border-radius collisions.
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

  :where([style*="--border:"]) {
    border: 1px solid oklch(
      from var(--_bg)
        /* L: reuse the contrast pattern — step toward the opposite pole
           clamp(0,(0.6-l)*999,1) = 1 on dark, 0 on light (the contrast target)
           (target - l) * fraction moves toward it; --border scales the fraction */
        calc(l + (clamp(0, calc((0.6 - l) * 999), 1) - l) * var(--border) * 0.1)
        /* C: subtle bloom — border gets slightly more chromatic */
        min(calc(c + var(--border) * 0.012), 0.15)
        /* H: tiny drift, same direction as --bg */
        calc(h + var(--border) * 0.3)
    );
    border-radius: var(--cfg-border-radius);
  }

  /* interactive border: intensify on hover */
  :where([style*="--border:"][style*="--interactive:"]):hover {
    --_b-eff: calc(var(--border) + var(--interactive) * 0.5);
    border-color: oklch(
      from var(--_bg)
        calc(l + (clamp(0, calc((0.6 - l) * 999), 1) - l) * var(--_b-eff) * 0.1)
        min(calc(c + var(--_b-eff) * 0.012), 0.15)
        calc(h + var(--_b-eff) * 0.3)
    );
  }

  :where([style*="--border:"][style*="--interactive:"]):active {
    --_b-eff: calc(var(--border) + var(--interactive));
    border-color: oklch(
      from var(--_bg)
        calc(l + (clamp(0, calc((0.6 - l) * 999), 1) - l) * var(--_b-eff) * 0.1)
        min(calc(c + var(--_b-eff) * 0.012), 0.15)
        calc(h + var(--_b-eff) * 0.3)
    );
  }


  /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     INTERACTIVE (hover/active)

     Trigger: --interactive in style attribute.
     Value = how many levels to shift on hover.
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

  :where([style*="--interactive:"]) { cursor: pointer; }

  :where([style*="--interactive:"]):hover {
    --_hover-level: calc(var(--bg) + var(--interactive));
    --_bg: oklch(
      from var(--color)
        clamp(10%, calc(var(--_bg-base) + var(--_hover-level) * var(--_bg-step)), 99%)
        min(calc(0.02 + var(--_hover-level) * var(--_hover-level) * 0.004), c)
        calc(h + var(--_hover-level) * 0.4)
    );
    background: var(--_bg);
  }

  :where([style*="--interactive:"]):active {
    --_active-level: calc(var(--bg) + var(--interactive) * 2);
    --_bg: oklch(
      from var(--color)
        clamp(10%, calc(var(--_bg-base) + var(--_active-level) * var(--_bg-step)), 99%)
        min(calc(0.02 + var(--_active-level) * var(--_active-level) * 0.004), c)
        calc(h + var(--_active-level) * 0.4)
    );
    background: var(--_bg);
  }


  /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     SHADOW

     Trigger: --shadow in style attribute. Value = elevation level.
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

  :where([style*="--shadow:"]) {
    box-shadow:
      0 calc(var(--shadow) * 1px) calc(var(--shadow) * 3px) calc(var(--shadow) * 1px)
      oklch(from var(--color) 30% calc(c * 0.5) h / calc(0.15 + var(--shadow) * 0.04));
  }


    /* Testing surface utility */
    .surface { --_depth: calc(var(--_depth) + 1); --bg: var(--_depth); }



}
4B. Engine.type

@layer engine.type {

    /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     TYPE — inline fluid math with pow()

     Trigger: --type in style attribute.

     THIS is the killer feature. Arbitrary fractional steps:
       --type: 2.7    (between h3 and h2)
       --type: -0.5   (slightly smaller than body)
       --type: 0.3    (just a nudge up)

     The formula (identical to v4's @function):
       min = cfg-type-min × cfg-type-min-ratio ^ step
       max = cfg-type-max × cfg-type-max-ratio ^ step
       result = clamp(min, fluid-interpolation, max) × scale

     pow() ships in Safari 15.4+. This works everywhere.
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

  body,
  :where(h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, small, .small, .xs),
  :where([style*="--type:"]) {
    --_t-min: calc(var(--cfg-type-min) * pow(var(--cfg-type-min-ratio), var(--type)));
    --_t-max: calc(var(--cfg-type-max) * pow(var(--cfg-type-max-ratio), var(--type)));
    font-size: calc(
      clamp(
        var(--_t-min),
        calc(
          var(--_t-min) + (var(--_t-max) - var(--_t-min)) *
            (100vi - var(--cfg-fluid-min-vp)) /
            (var(--cfg-fluid-max-vp) - var(--cfg-fluid-min-vp))
        ),
        var(--_t-max)
      ) * var(--cfg-type-scale)
    );
    letter-spacing: calc(0.01em - var(--type) * 0.01em);
    line-height: calc(1.5 - var(--type) * 0.075);
  }
}
4C. engine.space

@layer engine.space {
  /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     SPACE — inline fluid math (for use in --_gap etc)

     Pre-baked tokens are still provided for convenience,
     but you can also use inline calc with pow() anywhere.
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
  :root {
    --space--1: clamp(0.3571rem, 0.3247rem + 0.1299vi, 0.4545rem);
    --space-0:  clamp(0.5000rem, 0.4091rem + 0.3636vi, 0.7500rem);
    --space-1:  clamp(0.7000rem, 0.4727rem + 0.9091vi, 1.2375rem);
    --space-2:  clamp(0.9800rem, 0.4800rem + 2.0000vi, 2.0419rem);
    --space-3:  clamp(1.3720rem, 0.3822rem + 3.9593vi, 3.3691rem);
    --space-4:  clamp(1.9208rem, 0.1025rem + 7.2733vi, 5.5590rem);
    --space-5:  clamp(2.6891rem, 0.0000rem + 10.756vi, 9.1724rem);
  }
}
6. Theme.type
Font, Defualt styles ect type sizing engine controls the calcs for the spacing this is more theming

/* ── typography ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

@layer typography {
  :root {
    --font-body: Charter, 'Bitstream Charter', 'Sitka Text', Cambria, serif;
    --font-heading: 'Iowan Old Style', 'Palatino Linotype', 'URW Palladio L', P052, serif;
    --font-mono: 'Dank Mono', 'Operator Mono', Inconsolata, 'Fira Mono', ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', Monaco, monospace;
  }


    /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     TYPE — inline fluid math with pow()

     Trigger: --type in style attribute.

     THIS is the killer feature. Arbitrary fractional steps:
       --type: 2.7    (between h3 and h2)
       --type: -0.5   (slightly smaller than body)
       --type: 0.3    (just a nudge up)

     The formula (identical to v4's @function):
       min = cfg-type-min × cfg-type-min-ratio ^ step
       max = cfg-type-max × cfg-type-max-ratio ^ step
       result = clamp(min, fluid-interpolation, max) × scale

     pow() ships in Safari 15.4+. This works everywhere.
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

  body,
  :where(h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, small, .small, .xs),
  :where([style*="--type:"]) {
    --_t-min: calc(var(--cfg-type-min) * pow(var(--cfg-type-min-ratio), var(--type)));
    --_t-max: calc(var(--cfg-type-max) * pow(var(--cfg-type-max-ratio), var(--type)));
    font-size: calc(
      clamp(
        var(--_t-min),
        calc(
          var(--_t-min) + (var(--_t-max) - var(--_t-min)) *
            (100vi - var(--cfg-fluid-min-vp)) /
            (var(--cfg-fluid-max-vp) - var(--cfg-fluid-min-vp))
        ),
        var(--_t-max)
      ) * var(--cfg-type-scale)
    );
    letter-spacing: calc(0.01em - var(--type) * 0.01em);
    line-height: calc(1.5 - var(--type) * 0.075);
  }

    /* --- Typeogrophy Theme --- */

  body {
    font-family: var(--font-body);
    /* body type: step 0 — computed inline by the --type engine */
    --type: 0;
  }

  h1 { --type: 4;   font-family: var(--font-heading); }
  h2 { --type: 3;   font-family: var(--font-heading); }
  h3 { --type: 2;   font-family: var(--font-heading); }
  h4 { --type: 1;   font-family: var(--font-heading); }
  small, .small { --type: -1; }
  code, pre { font-family: var(--font-mono); }
  .xs { --type: -1.5; }

  /* heading color: inlined --background(18) accent */
  h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 {
    color: oklch(
      from var(--color)
        clamp(10%, calc((95% - var(--_dark) * 75%) + 18 * (-3% + var(--_dark) * 7%)), 99%)
        min(calc(0.02 + 324 * 0.004), c)
        calc(h + 7.2)
    );
  }

  /* muted: reduced contrast against current bg */
  .muted {
    color: oklch(
      from var(--_bg)
        calc(l + (clamp(0, calc((0.6 - l) * 999), 1) - l) * 0.4)
        c h
    );
  }

  a {
    color: oklch(
      from var(--color)
        clamp(10%, calc((95% - var(--_dark) * 75%) + 18 * (-3% + var(--_dark) * 7%)), 99%)
        min(calc(0.02 + 324 * 0.004), c)
        calc(h + 7.2)
    );
    text-decoration: none;
  }

  hr {
    border: none;
    height: 1px;
    background: oklch(from var(--_bg) l c h / 0.15);
  }
}
7. Components

/* ── components ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

@layer components {
  .stack { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: var(--_gap, var(--space-1)); }
  .row   { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: var(--_gap, var(--space-0)); align-items: center; }
  .grid  { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(var(--_col, 15rem), 1fr)); gap: var(--_gap, var(--space-1)); }

  .card {
    padding: var(--space-2);
    border-radius: 0.5rem;
    border: 1px solid oklch(from var(--_bg) l c h / 0.15);
  }

  .btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 0.4rem;
    padding: 0.4rem 1rem;
    border-radius: var(--cfg-border-radius);
    font-weight: 500;
    border: none;
  }

  .chip {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 0.15rem 0.65rem;
    border-radius: 999px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  }

  .swatch-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(3.5rem, 1fr));
    gap: 2px;
  }
  .swatch {
    aspect-ratio: 1;
    border-radius: 0.25rem;
    display: grid;
    place-items: center;
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-weight: 600;
  }
}
